content.rendered:
Turtle View 06

  • Porters, St. James
  • 4 guests
  • 2 bedroom
  • 2 bathroom

Welcome to Turtle View 6, your peaceful vacation home nestled within a serene gated community of 10 beautiful townhomes. If location is what you desire, then look no further – the townhome is perfectly situated just a short, leisurely 5-minute stroll away from the nearest beach (Alleynes Bay) and a delightful array of restaurants, including the famous Lonsestar, Jumas, and Jujus. Prepare to immerse yourself in the very essence of location and convenience!

The open-plan living space seamlessly blends a modern, fully-equipped kitchen with a spacious lounge area, providing the ideal setting for unwinding with loved ones or simply basking in your own company. For those who can’t quite escape work obligations, fear not – we’ve thoughtfully provided a dedicated office space, ensuring you can attend to your tasks while surrounded by tranquility.

The upper floor where two generously sized, air-conditioned bedrooms await. Each room is thoughtfully designed to provide a peaceful sanctuary for restful nights. The master bedroom boasts an en-suite bathroom, ensuring you have all the comfort and privacy you need during your stay.

Step out onto the inviting covered patio and discover your own private garden oasis, a true sanctuary of relaxation. Here, you can savor the island breeze, bask in the warm sun, or perhaps enjoy an al fresco meal as you take in the lush surroundings.

But that’s not all – get ready to rejuvenate yourself in your very own private plunge pool. Whether you’re seeking a refreshing dip to start your day or a leisurely soak to unwind in the evening, this pool is exclusively yours to enjoy at any hour. You also get to enjoy at the large communal pool as well.

Charges additional to the rate:

  • Cleaning fee (sweeping, dusting, cleaning) of US150
  • Laundry fee $40/ stay
  • During stay laundry fee (optional) US$ 10/ load

Security Deposit US$ 750

Please note that there is ongoing construction at a neighbouring property and noise may be heard from time to time.

Optional Grocery Pack

A complimentary grocery pack is available upon request only.
If you’d like to receive one, please select “Grocery Pack” under Additional Services on the booking confirmation page.

January 2025 · Stayed with kids

This house is absolutely fantastic! The kitchen is fully equipped, making it perfect for those...

This house is absolutely fantastic! The kitchen is fully equipped, making it perfect for those who enjoy cooking meals in. Having a private pool was a real treat, and when it wasn’t in the sun, the communal pool was a great alternative. The gated complex felt very secure, and the well-maintained grounds added to the overall experience.
The location couldn’t have been better—within walking distance of a few restaurants, and the bus ride into Holetown is an experience in itself! The bus service was excellent, making it easy to get to Bridgetown or Speightstown.
The staff were outstanding, going above and beyond to ensure a great stay. Communication was the best I’ve experienced on Airbnb. A special mention to Tracey, the cleaner, who was not only fabulous but also shared some great recommendations.
Would highly recommend!

Leanne

February 2025 · Stayed about a week
